issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This library supports using KSP instead of kapt, which greatly improves performance. Learn more: https://developer.android.com/studio/build/migrate-to-ksp
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/white` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.AppFood`)

Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.

Hardcoded string "Giỏ hàng trống", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Thêm món ăn vào giỏ hàng của bạn", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="Thêm món ăn vào giỏ hàng của bạn"

When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
